individualLivePreviewSave: persist_and_mark_saved requires a durable receipt before Saved
deadManSave: batch preflights controller transition and marks Saved after batch receipt
saveOnlyScalarSave: staged until one-file batch commit succeeds
structuredFamilySave: active preview controller consumes only a durable family receipt
safeLiveSaveModePersistence: uses the drift-protected gated scalar save
detailPaneBehavior: stages reviewed change; no alternate direct write
batchTransactionPolicy: one-file atomic exchange; multi-file rejected before writing
